name: Augmented Beef and Bacon Social Club Host

securitySheaf.label: Probe IC
securitySheaf.effect: A smiling host avatar checks loyalty credentials and purchase history.

securitySheaf.label: Scramble IC
securitySheaf.effect: Recipe cards and market data begin reshuffling around the intruder.

securitySheaf.label: Trace IC
securitySheaf.effect: A fulfillment-tracking process tries to attach a delivery address to the icon.

securitySheaf.label: Sparky IC
securitySheaf.effect: Industrial kitchen machinery arcs with hostile warning current.

sculpting: Private smokehouse club, mahogany counters, cold lockers, neon meat signs, branded crates, chef avatars, pit bosses, and predatory mascots.
notes: Absurd consumer-brand host with serious customer analytics, supplier records, and manufactured-authenticity strategy underneath the joke.

nodes.title: Smokehouse Club Porch
nodes.description: A neon smokehouse sign buzzes over a private-club doorway. The air is all synthetic hickory, chrome, and engineered appetite cues.

choices.label: Enter through customer or loyalty pathways

nodes.title: Mahogany Loyalty Lobby
nodes.description: Club plaques, butcher-block counters, and grinning mascot portraits steer customers toward subscriptions and identity-flavored meat fantasies.

choices.label: Read product and ad fulfillment data

nodes.title: Neon Menu Wall
nodes.description: Flavor profiles, fulfillment queues, loyalty offers, and influencer pushes hang as sizzling specials under impossible lighting.

choices.label: Trace a fulfillment or shell-vendor lead

nodes.title: Analytics Cold Locker
nodes.description: Customer preference carcasses hang on chrome hooks: aspiration, novelty buying, masculinity theater, and engineered appetite profiles.

nodes.title: Supplier Smoke Room
nodes.description: Behind the public joke branding, vendor ledgers and formula crates suggest a real data operation with ugly financing possibilities.

nodes.title: Executive Cigar-Bar Dining Room
nodes.description: Every velvet booth is also an ad surface. Strategy files discuss brand narrative, influencer bait, and manufactured authenticity.

nodes.title: Subscription Edit Block
nodes.description: A butcher-block form lets you change customer analytics, fulfillment queues, or subscription status while the host watches for spoiled credentials.

choices.label: Commit the change and package the proof

nodes.title: Factory Demo Grill Controls
nodes.description: Demo machines, kitchen props, and factory-linked subsystems clank behind a branded safety gate.

choices.label: Seize a control hook long enough to prove linkage
Slip back before the machinery bites

nodes.title: Branded Paydata Crate
nodes.description: You have a usable package: supplier oddities, customer leverage, marketing scandal hooks, or proof the silly brand is funding something uglier.

choices.label: Log off through the loyalty exit

nodes.title: Loyalty Exit
nodes.description: The smoke clears into ordinary Matrix traffic, leaving only a coupon popup and the faint smell of fake bacon.
